prose:
TEMPO frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: from user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz; this was a single point calculation. SCF converged in 12 cycles.

HOMO = -6.3375439 eV, LUMO = -2.4651235 eV, leading to a **gap of 3.8724203 eV**.

No warnings reported.
